name: lazyday-worldcup
description: World Cup match and Sporttery forecasting workflows for current fixtures, upset risk, portfolios, and champion predictions.

interface.shortDescription: World Cup match, Sporttery, and champion forecasting workflows.
interface.longDescription: Packages the forecasting-world-cup-matches skill for live World Cup fixture research, official Sporttery calculator data, upset-risk auditing, probability estimates, 2-leg portfolio construction, and champion or finalist forecasts.
defaultPrompt: Use World Cup Forecasting to analyze today's World Cup fixtures with current evidence.
Use World Cup Forecasting to fetch official Sporttery data and build eligible portfolio recommendations.
